meta.summary: All 17 pages return HTTP 200. Main pages (homepage, signup, home landing) render rich server-side content. Dashboard is client-rendered (expected). Several docs subpages render sidebar only with no main content in SSR — content loads client-side via JS. Stripe test-mode payment links found on homepage.

issues.detail: Stripe payment links use test mode URLs (buy.stripe.com/test/...). Three service tier CTAs (Audit $500, Build $5K-$15K, Retainer $2K-$5K/mo) all link to test Stripe checkout pages.

pages.notes: Homepage renders fully server-side. Contains: nav bar with 7 links (Dashboard, How It Works, Portfolio, Services, About, Contact, Conflux Home), hero section with loading placeholder (client-rendered animation), live dashboard stats (all showing 0), How It Works (4 agents: Helix/Forge/Quanta/Pulse), Portfolio (8 items), Services (3 tiers with pricing), About section, Contact form (name/email/service tier/message fields), social links (GitHub/Twitter/LinkedIn/Email), footer. OG/Twitter meta tags present. Title: 'The Conflux — AI Venture Studio'.
Signup page renders with form fields (email, password), Google OAuth button, and Sign Up text. Page is functional from SSR perspective.

issues.detail: Dashboard renders only a loading spinner server-side (animate-spin class). All content (Overview, Usage, API Keys, Billing tabs) loads client-side via JavaScript. This is expected behavior — requires authentication to display content.

pages.notes: SSR output is a centered loading spinner. Tab content (Overview, Usage, API Keys, Billing) renders client-side after auth. No broken elements detected in SSR shell.

Docs page renders with full sidebar navigation containing links to all 13 subpages: Quickstart, Authentication, Chat Completions, Models, Credits, Usage, API Keys, Model Catalog, Pricing, Changelog, SDKs, FAQ. Sidebar and content both render.
Quickstart page renders with rich content. Contains instructions for getting first API call running, 500 free credits mention, dashboard API key generation steps.
Chat Completions API docs page renders with substantial content. 14 content matches found.

issues.detail: Page renders sidebar navigation only. Main content area appears empty in SSR — content likely loads client-side via JavaScript. No article/section content visible in static HTML.

pages.notes: SSR output contains only the docs sidebar (17 nav links). No main content area text visible. Likely uses client-side component to fetch/render credits documentation.
API Keys docs page renders with content. 9 content matches found.

FAQ page renders with rich content (66KB). Contains multiple Q&A pairs including: 'What is Conflux Router?' (unified AI gateway, 16 models, 5 providers), 'How do I get started?' (500 free credits, no credit card), 'What API format?' (OpenAI-compatible). Page has 'Back to theconflux.com' link.

Home landing page renders fully server-side. Contains: version badge (v0.1.13), hero ('Your AI Family Lives Here'), platform selector (Linux/Windows/Android/Mac/iOS Soon), download button (.deb, 71 MB), features grid (6 cards: Agent Desktop, Real Conversations, Agent Marketplace, 2-Minute Setup, Persistent Memory, 100% Private), AI team roster (6 agents: Conflux/Prism/Helix/Forge/Pulse/Vector + 12 more), interactive previews (Dashboard/Chat/Marketplace/Settings), pricing tiers (Free $0, Pro $14.99/mo, Team $49.99/mo), stats section (18 agents, 2 min setup, 0 data collected, 71 MB), CTA section. OG/Twitter meta present. Schema.org SoftwareApplication markup with download URL. Title: 'Conflux Home — Your AI Family Lives Here'.

recommendations: Replace Stripe test-mode payment links with live payment links before launch (Homepage: Audit, Build, Retainer CTAs)

6 docs subpages render empty main content in SSR (/docs/api/credits, /docs/api/models, /docs/api/usage, /docs/models, /docs/pricing, /docs/changelog). Verify these load correctly in a real browser with JavaScript enabled. If SEO matters, consider SSR/SSG for these pages.
Dashboard (/dashboard) is fully client-rendered by design — this is acceptable but means the page shows only a spinner without JavaScript or authentication.
Homepage hero section shows 'Loading...' placeholder in SSR — relies on client-side JS for animation. Minor SEO concern.
All dashboard stats on homepage show 0 (Products Launched, AI Agents Active, Ad Spend, Autonomous Pipeline). Consider populating with real data or hiding until data exists.
